plain:
I'm out here scrollin' and scrollin’
Scroll slow, homie
Tryna farm dopamine
you feel me?
But in truth and reality

I'm antisocial, cause I'm always on social And I wanna feel social, but I'm never really social
I'm antisocial, cause I'm always on social Watchin' everybody glow up, and I just wanna glow too
I'm antisocial, cause I'm always on social Watchin' people vacate to places I wanna go to

If it sounds like you, I guess I really know you Even though I don't know you, cause it's what I used to go through
Only way to beat it is to own it So if you're gonna be here, follow me to where the dough is
If you're here religiously, then know this I can help you get more conversions than the Pope did
Fo’ sho, kid!

Life is a blur when you start to get motion That's why I offer coaching to get you back focused
I’ll drop you a line if you write a note below this And show you the ropes before you get roped in
When I tell you what the fee is You can love it, you can leave it, as long as you believe
